subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! The detailed letter which thou didst address to Jináb-i-Manshádí was perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه مفصل که بجناب منشادی مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید از عدم
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @Shrines and Holy places, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
